description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for ATLAS, a Neo4j-powered task management system for LLM Agents - implementing a three-tier architecture (Projects, Tasks, Knowledge) to manage complex workflows. Now with Deep Research.

findings.title: Supply Chain CVE: GHSA-9965-vmph-33xx in validator@13.15.15
findings.recommendation: Upgrade validator to a version that resolves GHSA-9965-vmph-33xx. Check https://osv.dev/vulnerability/GHSA-9965-vmph-33xx for patched versions. Enable Dependabot or OSV-Scanner in CI to catch future CVEs automatically.
